title: StitchedSnow
description: Allows snow to stack in Minecraft
body:
# Simply makes snow stack
The snow will melt after it stops snowing to return to a normal looking snowy biome.

## What it looks like:  
![Upclose view of snow](https://i.imgur.com/iy0zoev.png)
![Overview of snow effect](https://i.imgur.com/9U8ZzFS.png)
